title: Cajun chicken – quick for a Monday night

seo.title: Cajun chicken - quick for a Monday night - Marinda Kook

html:
I was in the mood for roast chicken tonight, but with a kick. So I made cajun chicken with a bit of a twist. It tasted delicious and there's still some left for tomorrow's sandwich.

 

NEEDED:

  • 1 whole chicken
  • 1 onion roughly chopped
  • 1 butternut cut into pieces
  • 2 potatoes cut into pieces
  • 2 lemons cut into quarters
  • 2 whole chillies (optional)
  • 5 ml ginger
  • 5 ml garlic
  • sprig of rosemary and a sprig of thyme (optional)
  • 250 ml water
  • 30 ml olive oil
  • 30 ml lemon juice
  • 20 ml cajun spice

NOW:

  1. put your onions, potatoes, butternut, chillies, lemons, thyme, rosemary and water in an oven dish
  2. mix the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger and cajun spice and rub the chicken well with it
  3. place the chicken on the vegetables and cover with tinfoil
  4. bake at 180 degrees celsius for 30 minutes covered and then bake for another 30 minutes uncovered so it browns nicely

Eat together with rice and if you're brave enough, eat one of the chillies!
